data.name: NetworkEditorGuiPlugin_GetViewInfoForHydroAreaFeatureCollection_Remove_group
data.value: Remove group

data.name: CrossSectionDefinitionExtensions_AddCrossSectionSection_Could_not_add_CrossSectionSection_with_negative_length__0__to_cross_section_definition___1___
data.value: Could not add CrossSectionSection with negative length {0} to cross section definition '{1}'

data.name: CrossSectionDefinitionExtensions_AddCrossSectionSection_Could_not_add_CrossSectionSection_with_duplicate_name___0__
data.value: Could not add CrossSectionSection with duplicate name '{0}'

data.name: SewerConnection_BranchFeatures_Sewer_connection__0__does_not_accept_more_than_one_branch_feature_
data.value: Sewer connection {0} does not accept more than one branch feature.

data.name: Pipe_BranchFeaturesOnCollectionChanging_Pipe__0__does_not_allow_any_branch_feature_on_it_
data.value: Pipe {0} does not allow any branch feature on it.

data.name: CrossSectionDefinitionZW_RefreshSectionsWidths_The_Main_section_width_of_cross_section__0__has_been_changed_from__1__m_to__2__m_
data.value: The Main section width of cross section {0} has been changed from {1} m to {2} m.

data.name: CrossSectionDefinitionExtensions_AdjustSectionWidths_The__0__section_width_of_cross_section__1__has_been_changed_from__2_m_to__3_m
data.value: The {0} section width of cross section {1} has been changed from {2}m to {3}m

data.name: HydroNetworkExtensions_MakeNamesUnique_Branch_feature_names_must_be_unique__the_following_Branch_features_have_been_renamed_
data.value: Branch feature names must be unique, the following Branch features have been renamed:

data.name: SewerConnection_TargetCompartment_We_cannot_add_compartment_as_source
data.value: We cannot add compartment {0} as source of sewer connection {1}, because it has no parent manhole.

data.name: SewerConnection_TargetCompartment_We_cannot_add_compartment_as_target
data.value: We cannot add compartment {0} as target of sewer connection {1}, because it has no parent manhole.

data.value: ..\Resources\nwrw.png;System.Drawing.Bitmap, System.Drawing, Version=4.0.0.0, Culture=neutral, PublicKeyToken=b03f5f7f11d50a3a

data.name: HydroModelGuiGraphicsProvider_CanProvideDrawingGroupFor_1D_2D_Integrated_Model_RHU
data.value: 1D-2D Integrated Model (RHU)

data.name: HydroModelApplicationPlugin_GetModelInfos_Empty_Integrated_Model
data.value: Empty Integrated Model

data.name: HydroModelApplicationPlugin_GetModelInfos_1D_2D_3D_Integrated_Models
data.value: 1D / 2D / 3D Integrated Models

data.name: Reconnect_output_files_edit_action
data.value: Reconnect output files

data.name: Disconnect_output_files_edit_action
data.value: Disconnecting from output files

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Values_storage_graph_retention_should_be_greater_than_zero
data.value: The values in the storage graph of retention {0} should be greater than zero.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Table_should_be_used_for_retention
data.value: Table should be used for {0}, but no values are set.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Table_is_used_for_retention_but_wrong_value_at_specific_height
data.value: Table should be used for {0}, but at height {1} storage value is {2} which is not allowed (should be higher than 0).

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Gated_culvert_has_no_gate_opening_table
data.value: Culvert {0} is gated and has no gate opening loss coefficient datatable.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_No_coordinate_system_selected_for_network
data.value: No Coordinate System selected for Network. Default map projection will be used for distance calculations.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Cannot_perform_calculation_in_geographical_coordinate_system
data.value: Cannot perform calculation in geographical coordinate system {0}

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Multiple_branches_with_same_order_number_connected_to_single_node
data.value: More than two branches with the same order number '{0}' are connected to node {1}; can not start calculation.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Target_and_source_node_of_branch_have_same_id
data.value: Target and source node of branch '{0}' have the same id, '{1}'. Circular branch?

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Branch_has_invalid_order_number
data.value: Branch '{0}' has an order number of '{1}'. Order number can be -1 (no interpolation over node) or greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Floodplain2_width_cannot_be_larger_than_0_if_floodplain1_width_is_0
data.value: FloodPlain2 width cannot be larger than 0.0, if FloodPlain1 width is equal to 0.0.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Maximum_flow_width_of_cross_section_does_not_match_total_width
data.value: The maximum flow width of this cross section does not match the total width of all its sections.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Tabulated_cross_section_cannot_have_0_width_above_deepest_point
data.value: Tabulated cross section {0} cannot have zero width at levels above deepest point of its definition.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Invalid_flow_profile
data.value: Invalid flow profile.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_No_profile_defined
data.value: No profile defined.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Street_storage_area_is_0
data.value: Street storage area is set to 0. Recommended to use storage type closed instead of reservoir.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Length_must_be_larger_than_0
data.value: Length must be larger than 0.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Width_or_diamater_must_be_larger_than_0
data.value: Width / diameter must be larger than 0.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_No_cross_sections_on_channels
data.value: No cross sections on channel(s) {0}; can not start calculation.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Multiple_cross_section_types_per_branch_not_supported
data.value: Multiple cross-section-types (mix of Standard/ZW and Geometry/YZ) per branch(es) not supported.({0})

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Maximum_flow_width_of_cross_sections_is_larger_than_total_width
data.value: The maximum flow width of one or more cross sections is larger than the total width of all its sections.

data.name: HydroNetworkValidator_Cross_section_sections_issues
data.value: Cross section sections issues ({0})
